name: starlight-knowledge-tree
description: An open intelligence graph for human capability, scientific knowledge, and contribution paths.

scripts.validate: npm run build --workspace @starlight/graph-schema && npm run validate --workspace @starlight/graph-utils
scripts.validate:fiction: npm run build --workspace @starlight/graph-schema && npm run validate:fiction --workspace @starlight/graph-utils
scripts.test:fiction: npm run build --workspace @starlight/graph-schema && npm run test --workspace @starlight/graph-utils
